visual_description:
A man in a dark suit is shown from the side, looking down at a computer monitor. The room is dark, with the primary light source coming from the blue glow of the screen. The man has short, dark hair and is wearing a white collared shirt. In the top left corner of the frame, there is a watermark with Chinese characters that read "风行网". The camera is positioned in a medium shot, focusing on the man and the computer screen. The audio presents a tense and serious exchange between two men in what sounds like an interrogation or a high-stakes investigation. The first man speaks with a sharp, commanding voice, his tone urgent and demanding as he asks, "有。韩春和的手下的手提电话有没有打过？" (Yes. Has Han Chunhe's subordinate's cell phone been called?).

The camera cuts to a close-up of a different man's face. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a headset with the earpieces resting around his neck. He looks down intently, his expression serious and focused, as if he is concentrating on something just out of frame, likely the computer screen. The background is dark and out of focus. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top left corner
